reviews.review_description: So they fixed the original problem but now it's says it's pirated and will now close. Even after uninstalling and  reinstalling it still said it was pirated. I tried uninstalling them restarting my oculus and reinstalling but it said the same thing.

developer_response.body: problem fixed. Thanks for report it

reviews.review_description: I've always loved the 19XX games, and this knocks it out of the park.  The different play perspectives are super-cool! And even though I get nauseous playing almost everything on the Quest, this was very comfortable! I played the DEMO but may pull the trigger on the full game.

developer_response.body: Sorry. I don't understand your review

reviews.review_description: I'm only on the demo but If the rest of the game is better I think it's a must have !!

Good game. I used to play 1942 and 1943 a lot in the arcades. This isn't as good as those games and I got motion sick at times from it.  The 3D immersion zones don't play as well as the rest of the game.  Good try anyway.

reviews.review_title: Pirate so stop the game directly
reviews.review_description:
Great to shoot the pirate  in 9 hours fast response from the devs

Great to have a demo to try out the game like in the old days shooting game but on a big vr screen and some time warped to a real 3d flying mode like all the game

Greeting from the Belgium air
Gave me a huge head ache...

This will be a must buy when complete. It hardens back to those old bullet hell games, while offering a VR/3D twist. There are a few issues with responsiveness during in cockpit game play and sound (elevation controls not as responsive as their counter parts, and guns shot a single shot but if I am holding down triggersounds like a hail of bullets). But over all: great models, fun power up and upgrade systems, decent soundtrack/effects, enemies are varied and follow the patterns of old (giving the game that retro vibe), voice over is definitely better than many of the app lab new comers.  
      I will support these guys cause I want to see more from this game and whatever they dabble at in the future. Rating this a 5 star due to the scope, ambition and you get to try a quality product before you buy! Also, it seemed to be comfortable for those who are prone to motion sickness (like my brother who played and enjoyed).

It’s not really a VR game, I get it was or still is a mobile game. So... that makes it the worst idea for a VR game. You play in 2D which doesn’t immerse you. Gameplay is fine. There is some actual “Immersion Areas” where you actually fly the plane though. I would love the game if the WHOLE THING was actually in VR.
the perfect mix between the retro and the new vr games!
Yeah sorry but I’m not sure you can make this a vr game unless it’s all in the cockpit it just doesn’t work. Don’t get me wrong I love 1976 but not this one

I've played many vr games on ps vr and oculus quest 2 and this games has best 3d pop out graphics I've ever seen on any vr game ever!! N I used to play this game on my mobile all the time as its one of my favourite types of game on mobile n to bring it to a big screen and to have planes fly out the screen towards you is amazing enough the cockpit view is not as good and hard to steer but apart from that it's amazing I would rate it 9.5/10 if cockpit view was better or took out completely the game would be 10/10 It's still on my top 4 to buy tho among the climb 2 and onward vr and peco peco...
Very nice adaptation of this classic with a good sound, good atmosphere, the 3D is bluffent. a real VR game
